examples: Jemima was a Bonny Highland lassie of 15.
“Jemima Puddleduck” is a treatise on enterprise.
It will be a great deal better than leaving him only with Jemima.
Aunt Jemima's visage (see story, p. 100) is one that has changed with the times.
The search for a new Jemima took place at the Royal Oak pub in Fishguard on Wednesday night.
